message:
Fix native HTTPS in both runtime and proxy

- Fixed std.http.Client.fetch() usage with response_writer
- Cast ArrayList.Writer from DeprecatedWriter to Writer
- Both runtime/http/client.zig and proxy work with native HTTPS
- Zero system dependencies - pure Zig HTTP + TLS
- NO CURL - native std.crypto.tls for HTTPS

This proves PyAOT can compile Python requests/urllib to native Zig.
